title: Flint Overflow!
description: Clean up all that extra flint lying around.
body:
Introducing Flint Overflow, a Minecraft modification inspired by the [Better Compressed Blocks](https://modrinth.com/mod/better-compressed-blocks) mod, Flint Overflow brings a extra convenience by introducing compressed flint blocks into your game.

**Unleash the Power of Compressed Flint Blocks:**

In many tech mods, such as [Create](https://modrinth.com/mod/create-fabric), the issue of flint overflow becomes a common concern. As valuable as flint is in trading with fletchers, the sheer abundance produced by advanced farms can quickly clutter storage systems.

**Key Features:**

- **Space-Efficient Storage:** Flint Overflow tackles the storage challenge head-on by introducing compressed flint blocks. Condense your flint surplus into these blocks to maximize storage efficiency and keep your inventories neat and organized.

- **Resource Management:** Utilize the compressed flint blocks to streamline your resource management. Whether you're a seasoned player navigating the intricacies of tech mods or a newcomer looking to optimize your gameplay, Flint Overflow provides a practical solution to the abundance of flint.

- **Compatible with Existing Mods:** Seamlessly integrate Flint Overflow into your existing modpacks, complementing the gameplay dynamics. The mod is designed to enhance rather than disrupt your gaming experience.
